message: Hey everyone. I'm pumped today about our flash sale
You know it's been 53 years since the Beatles released Abbey Road right? My favourite album
53 years already?? Wow that makes me feel old...
Indeed! We're celebrating today by promoting a flash sale on retro items from 1969

Welcome to Bez's Beatles day, the responsibility is on you to size up the problem.

 *Use `/help` at any time for a list of useful links and commands*
 *Use `/incident` to create an incident record*

Once you're ready just click start to begin Start button

:star: Send first comms in first 5 minutes
Just saw the incident ticket come through, can someone tell me what's going on? This sale is huge for us
No new orders have been processed in the UK region for the last 10 minutes
UK is our biggest market, accounting for 35% of our user base
We've received over 380+ complaints in that time period, all with the same failure symptoms
Social media is picking up on it too, mentions on Twitter and Reddit saying 'Checkout is broken'
We're not seeing the issue outside the UK.  Other regions seem to be unaffected
How is our customers doing? Let's put out a post letting them know we are investigating
I can see orders have taken a dip, keep me updated in the business channel James
• *Change ID:* CHG89362, *Description:* Deploying Bitcoin as a payment option for the UK region.
I'll stay out of your way over here, but check in on the business channel every now and then
this was a change to payment service and specifically for UK where we are seeing issues

Could Shay's change in Checkout be skipping some validation maybe?

your right!

on it

My change only introduced the crypto, which is not live yet. It shouldn't cause any problems with payments
